statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.TryCatchTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName FROM bronze.Product WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM bronze.Product WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT ProductID, ProductName FROM bronze.Product ), logical AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM import WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL ), final AS ( SELECT * FROM logical ) SELECT * FROM final;

source_tables.summary: Both queries source from bronze.Product. Refactored query uses CTE wrapping but same source table.

output_columns.summary: Both queries output ProductAlternateKey (CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))) and EnglishProductName (ProductName). Refactored query preserves column names and types through CTE chain.

joins.summary: No joins in either query. Both are single-table queries without joins.

filters.summary: Both queries filter WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL. Refactored query applies same filter in logical CTE.

aggregation_grain.summary: No aggregation in either query. Both return row-by-row results at source table grain.
